title: React
subTitle: Building modern, responsive SPAs
overviewContent: I build responsive single-page applications with React, managing state with hooks and applying best practices for clean, maintainable code. My work includes performance optimisation such as lazy loading and code splitting to deliver smooth, efficient applications. I use React in production — including the H & H Lawyers rebuild and this portfolio — emphasising reusable components, modular architecture, and scalable design patterns.
